title: KubeJS Diesel Generators
description: Create: Diesel Generators integration for KubeJS
body:
Create: Diesel Generators integration for KubeJS. It allows you to create the current recipes:

**Changes on 17.03.25: Removed the old version because the newer version have better syntax**

I have pushed Updates for:

1.19.2 with version v1.1.1

1.20.1 with version v1.1.1 

and for

1.20.1 with version v1.2.1 (Create v6 & DG v1.3) 

**A Reminder you need KubeJs Create for the newest versions**


Examples of the recipes for 1.18.2 in version 1.0.0:
![Examples of the recipes for 1.18.2 in action in version 1.0.0:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa9a5dd4018295b81a22230b7cdf98159f663524.png)
  
Examples of the recipes for 1.19.2 & 1.20.1 in action in version 1.1.1:
![Examples of the recipes for 1.19.2 & 1.20.1 in action in version 1.1.1:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/451e469b14ddb21c514cc71058c8dcc736970977.png)


Examples of the recipes for 1.20.1 in action in version 1.2.1:
![Examples of the recipes for 1.20.1 in action in version 1.2.1:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd5230820ea21c1b436904eaa41719a287544ee5.png)

![Examples of the recipes for 1.20.1 in action in version 1.2.1:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6da6baf7244c37e8616167d9fd36cc02da04b7bd.png)


If you have any suggestions you can write it into the Discord Channel: Vorschläge  or if you have any issues pls use the Discord Channel: Fehler und Bugs in our Discord.
You can see the channels under the categorie: Minecraft-Modding.

Be sure you only write german or english at the discord.
For issues please provide the crashlog, latestlog, serverlog from KubeJS and any steps which ones you made to the issue or if you can reproduced it.
